title: 23rd March 1931: Shaheed
desc: A freedom fighter is arrested for killing an officer responsible for his mentor's death.

title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
desc: Troubles arise for a woman when her husband is killed and she gets abducted by goons.

title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
desc: A wounded serpent seeks revenge on the killers of her husband. Does she finally manage to succeed in her mission?

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
desc: An astrology-obsessed idler romances a fish heiress whose father seeks a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
desc: Raja, a carefree dreamer, is told by an astrologer that fortune awaits him. He falls for Shalu, a rich girl, but her father demands he prove himself through hard work and success.

title: Prem Rog
desc: After a series of tragedies, Devdhar vows to bring happiness back in Manorama's life.

title: Prem Rog
desc: Devdhar vows to bring happiness back in Manorama's life after she is widowed. This leads him to face the wrath of his family and his villagers.

title: Ajay
desc: In a gripping quest for justice, Ajay infiltrates the criminal underworld to expose his family's killer, navigating danger and moral dilemmas in a relentless pursuit of truth.

title: Ajay
desc: Manorama's wicked uncles do not accept the man she has chosen to marry.

title: Chaalbaaz
desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju swap lives by chance. Shy Anju adapts to rural life, while bold Manju seeks revenge against their cruel uncle for past wrongs.

title: Chaalbaaz
desc: When long-separated twins Anju and Manju end up trading places, their worlds erupt in chaos.

title: Kohram
desc: A colonel's botched hit leads to a hidden life-until an undercover major tracks him down and joins forces to bring a corrupt minister to justice.

title: Kohram
desc: Major Ajit teams up with Colonel Sodhi to expose Veer Bhadra Singh, a corrupt minister.

title: Baazigar
desc: A scheming killer plans to destroy a businessman's family, starting with the brutal murder of his eldest daughter. This chilling thriller unfolds as the businessman fights to protect his loved ones.

title: Baazigar
desc: A cold-blooded man with a vendetta against a businessman decides to destroy his family.

title: Maseeha
desc: Krishna and Shiva unite against the ruthless gangster Surajbhan, whose terror touched both their lives. Together, they vow to bring justice and end his reign of fear.

title: Trimurti
desc: A wrongfully convicted policewoman expects her three children to settle scores with her enemy.

title: Trimurti
desc: Kalyani fights to save her son Nandu after his arrest, asking Jagannath for mercy and his release, hoping fairness, hope, and relief will come soon.

title: Mashooq
desc: A family rivalry becomes an obstacle in the way of Karan and Neha's relationship.

title: Prem Granth
desc: Somen, a rich man, falls in love with Kajri, a village belle, and they get separated unexpectedly.

title: Avtaar
desc: Avtaar reaches new heights of success after his sons betray him and his wife, Radha.

title: Apaharan
desc: An aspiring police officer is drawn into the crime world when his dreams get shattered.

title: Krantiveer
desc: A gambler embarks on a mission of vengeance after the murder of his adoptive father.

title: Dadagiri
desc: Goddess Lakshmi and Lord Vishnu meddle in the lives of two mortals after a quarrel.

title: Ghajini
desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

title: Anari No 1
desc: A devoted son navigates family pride, love and sacrifice, striving to uphold his father's honor while following his heart.
